## Task Description

Implement or document a small PI calculation challenge for TaskFlow's internal engineering playground. The solution should be easy to run locally and should explain the selected algorithm.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Add a simple PI calculation implementation or documented algorithm note.
- [ ] Include clear instructions for running or reviewing the challenge.
- [ ] Keep the implementation deterministic and lightweight.
- [ ] Reference this issue in the pull request.

## Bounty Amount

/bounty $50
